text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I spot Mejiro Ardan, Mejiro Ryan, and Daiwa
Scarlet chatting in the corner of the cafeteria.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Really?! I didn't know you two like shojo manga!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Why, yes. Reading is a treasured pastime of mine,
and shojo manga has something to offer every
generation.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Y-yeah. I've read a couple too...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Oh? Is something the matter, Ryan? You keep
looking over your shoulder...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Uh, well... It would be a little embarrassing if
everyone found out I read romanc—

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Ah, ahem! I mean, no real reason!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: So! Have either of you read any good ones lately?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Let me think, um...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: I read "Love Passing Love" and it was great! There's this scene in a classroom after school where the main character realizes her childhood friend likes likes her!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
And it's the perfect moment for her friend to
open up... but they can't muster up the
courage—and the main character ends up pushing
them away!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I know it's a cliche, but for me, the real charm of
romance comics is those scenes where you have
two characters struggling to convey their feelings
for each other!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
You're absolutely right. The opposite always
works wonders too, when you have lovers whose
feelings are in sync, but fate keeps throwing
obstacles their way.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Oh, I know just what you mean! There's also—

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Ah... N-never mind...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
What about you, Ryan? Have you read any good
manga recently?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Me?! Oh, um... I recommend...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Um, I... Well...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
O-oh! Sorry! I just haven't had time to read
much... Ardan, could you recommend something
instead?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Very well. I shall do so.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I must admit, historical and fantasy settings
appeal very much to me. The last comic I read,
"Distant Dragon River," was one such title.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
The two leads are deeply in love, but they're also
leaders of warring nations. In one particularly
memorable scene, the two secretly meet under
the cover of darkness to negotiate a truce.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: I-i-in secret? R-really?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Yes... For the heart-wrenching truth is that this is
the only way they can meet anymore.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Knowing that so many lives are depending on
them, they're forced to suppress their emotions
and focus solely on the negotiations...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
However, after seeing one another's faces, it's not
long before they stop negotiating and start
reminiscing about days gone by... Their feelings
soon win out...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
The distance between them grows smaller and
smaller... Their fingers intertwine—

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: ...Wha-wha-wha! EEEEEK!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: I c-can't handle this anymore!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Ryan cries out as she runs right past me
and off to who knows where...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Ryan, what's wrong?!
Oh? Hello, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
...Did you overhear our conversation just now?
Did I... happen to say something strange to Ryan?
choice_data_list:
...She wasn't quite ready for that kind of detail
yet.

...She wasn't quite ready for that kind of detail
yet.

Your description was so good she got
emotionally invested.

Your description was so good she got
emotionally invested.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
...Did you overhear our conversation just now?
Did I... happen to say something strange to Ryan?
choice_data_list:
...She wasn't quite ready for that kind of detail
yet.

...She wasn't quite ready for that kind of detail
yet.

Your description was so good she got
emotionally invested.

Your description was so good she got
emotionally invested.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: She wasn't ready? What do you mean by that?
choice_data_list:
I think that might've been too much to take in
all of a sudden...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Now that you mention it, the part I recounted was
the climax of the middle act... Oh dear, I believe
that might have been a "spoiler," as they say.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Ah... How careless of me. I must remember to be
more cautious when giving recommendations.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I think she might be missing the point somewhat...
but at least she looks committed to bettering
herself.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
So that's it... Well, it is true—your recounting of
the story was fantastic, Ardan!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
But to run off all of a sudden like that... Ryan
must be quite the emotional type.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Yes. Ryan's always been somewhat sensitive...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Which is precisely why I hoped she'd open up and
recommend a comic that stirred all those
emotions of hers...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Now I'm really curious... Next time the
opportunity arises, I'd love to hear what Ryan has
to say!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Indeed... Well, when that day comes, be sure to
take a comfortable seat. Hehe.
